ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., accelerometer, temperature sensor) */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment the sensor is attached to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the sensor (e.g., vibration, temperature) */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of sensor calibration (in days) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data collected */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor value */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sensor data (0-1) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, simulation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accelerometer_data" (
  "accel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accelerometer data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the data was collected */,
  "accel_X" REAL /* X-axis acceleration value */,
  "accel_Y" REAL /* Y-axis acceleration value */,
  "accel_Z" REAL /* Z-axis acceleration value */,
  "unit_of_measurement_X" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the X-axis acceleration value */,
  "unit_of_measurement_Y" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the Y-axis acceleration value */,
  "unit_of_measurement_Z" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the Z-axis acceleration value */,
  "confidence_score_X" REAL /* Confidence score of the X-axis acceleration value */,
  "confidence_score_Y" REAL /* Confidence score of the Y-axis acceleration value */,
  "confidence_score_Z" REAL /* Confidence score of the Z-axis acceleration value */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, simulation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accelerometer_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., pump, motor) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was last maintained */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the next maintenance is scheduled */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the equipment (e.g., operational, under maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., maintenance, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., maintenance, IT, data analysis) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sensor data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the sensor data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Whether the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that triggered the alert */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment associated with the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high vibration, high temperature) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high, critical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was resolved */,
  "resolved_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment that received maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_time" TEXT /* Time when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "performed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance in minutes */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Whether the maintenance is completed */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was completed */,
  "completion_time" TEXT /* Time the maintenance was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_performed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)
